name: Canned Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Light tuna or bonito, drained, 6.5 oz
2 oz Cheddar Cheese, or more to taste, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice following package directions.
2. Stir soup into rice.
3. Mash tuna and stir into rice mixture.
4. Spread butter over inside of 1 3/4-quart casserole.
5. Sprinkle bread crumbs over butter.
6. Pour tuna-rice mixture into casserole and sprinkle with grated cheese.
7. Bake on middle shelf of preheated 375-degree oven for 30 minutes. Serves 4 to 6.
Variation: Add any vegetables you fancy to the rice mixture. It's a good way to use up leftover peas and/or carrots.
